special_mechanics.name: Character Switching
special_mechanics.description: Player can switch between four characters (Samson, Kikira, Gamm, K.O.) at any time during gameplay, each with distinct movement and combat abilities

special_mechanics.name: Wall Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Samson and K.O. can climb walls and ceilings

special_mechanics.name: Flight
special_mechanics.description: Kikira can fly for brief periods with limited duration

special_mechanics.name: Spike Walking
special_mechanics.description: Gamm can walk on spikes without taking damage

tier_notes: T2 empirical/qualitative. Sources contain gameplay descriptions and character abilities but lack precise physics parameters. No numerical movement values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel information documented in available sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Little Samson
